ideation: This animation sequence depicts a mother protectively embracing her two sons.  The animation emphasizes gentle, encompassing movements. Frame 1 shows a relaxed posture, with the arms slightly open and palms facing inward. In frame 2, the mother's arms begin to move towards her children, slightly bending at the 'shoulders' (joints). In frame 3, the arms fully embrace her children, with hands wrapping around them. Frame 4 shows the hands gently moving to rest on the children, showing affection. Frame 5 returns to a relaxed but still protective posture.

frames.beat: arms hang loosely, ready to embrace
arms begin to open and reach out gently
arms open wide, ready to gather in
arms wrap around children, a tender hold
arms rest softly, a protective embrace
